claim_boundary: Closure audit only. Diagnostic evidence is mapped to merged PRs, but no benchmark-strength campaign, Slurm/GPU submission, paper claim, dissertation claim, conformal claim, deployment claim, real-world safety claim, or generalized planner-superiority claim is made.

criteria.criterion: Pre-register packet with tiers, claim modes, forbidden claims, and execution boundary.
Provide visible campaign-arm configuration or deterministic runner inputs.
Static validation and tests pass before campaign execution.
Predeclare metrics and stop or revise rules.
Run CPU diagnostic alpha slice first.
Submit private benchmark campaign if justified.
criteria.residual_blocker: compute_submit=false for this run; benchmark-strength campaign remains a later authorized claim-promotion task.

criteria.criterion: Build compact benchmark evidence with provenance and checksums if benchmark is run.
criteria.residual_blocker: Diagnostic compact evidence exists; benchmark-strength compact evidence cannot exist until benchmark campaign runs.

criteria.criterion: Exclude fallback, degraded, not-available, failed, blocked, and diagnostic-only rows from benchmark-strength evidence.
Gate claim-map, report, paper, or dissertation edits on supported evidence and maintainer sign-off.
Avoid conformal, deployment, real-world safety, and generalized planner-superiority claims.

closure_call: Refs #4232; do not close until benchmark-strength campaign evidence is produced or a maintainer explicitly closes at diagnostic-only status.
